title: Sabina coxii
taxonomy: Sabina coxii is classified within the family Pinaceae. It belongs to the genus Sabina, which is a group of evergreen coniferous trees. The species Sabina coxii is native to certain regions in Asia. This species is often associated with other species within the genus, such as Sabina chengkouensis. The classification of Sabina coxii is subject to ongoing research and refinement.
uses: Sabina coxii is a plant species that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties.
